description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image and a REPO_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/sj14/gosh. Include a global before_script that creates the GOPATH source directory for $REPO_NAME, symlinks the project directory into it, and changes to that directory. Define two stages, test and build. In the test stage add a format job that runs go fmt $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/), then go vet $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/), and finally go test -race $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/). In the build stage add a compile job that runs go build -race -ldflags "-extldflags '-static'" -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/mybinary, and publishes the resulting mybinary file as an artifact.
